case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.- TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. SKYLOR ANDRY

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.- TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRY, SKYLOR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.- TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE ELAN LAMBERT. FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.- TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELAN C. LAMBERT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN C. LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,805.10 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.- TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRY, SKYLOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.- TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDRY, SKYLOR $3,805.10 PRINCIPAL, $60.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,865.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2013 - JUDGMENT.
